chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1616 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 3227/25 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CMA 3228/25 4.For orders on CMA 3229/25 5.For hearing of main case. 22-09-2025 Mr. Yameen Ali Khoso, Advocate for the petitioner. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to5. Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that the petitioner will file petition afresh after removing some defects. Order accordingly. Instant petition along with listed applications is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
